main.description: A base avatar definition. Defines the character body with animated sprites for every direction and state combination.

name.description: Display name for the base avatar.

description.description: Free-form description of the base avatar.

layers.description: Animation layers for the base avatar. A complete base avatar should provide layers for the well-known targets: idle (south/north/east/west), walk (south/north/east/west), sit (south/north/east/west), hold (south/north/east/west), push (south/north/east/west), pickup (south/north/east/west), and dance. Frame count and frame rate are per-layer. Authoring tools may generate east/west by mirroring.

behaviors.description: Lua scripts that define how this avatar base responds to events (e.g. setting animation state based on movement, intercepting move events).

stateProperties.description: Declares the configurable state properties for this base avatar. Behaviors read these via entityState.
